title: Level Z - Deeper and Darker
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Deeper and Darker mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Deeper and Darker mod.

This addon adds level requirements for most Deeper and Darker blocks, weapons and armors to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add this mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
